title: Beetroots to Mandrakes
description: Replaces beetroot related blocks and items to mandrakes
body:
![Top Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fcfeba3062c7f63bc89e40a763023757f45ea1c.png) \ What if minecraft had... mandrakes? This magical looking plants known mostly their interestingly shaped roots an it's medical aplications should be interesting replacement for a beet boring beetroot in game. Try asking questions to the root - it should answer all of them (look at their face - they know everything), but be cautios when pulling it out of soil! \ \ ![Mandrake textures comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39b85ce4a7cf62a8b9be17c2deab1d92d4375bbe.png) \ \ Comparison of beetroot textures (vanilla) and mandrake textures from pack \ **NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED**

**Supported languages:** - English (en_us) - Polish (pl_pl) - LOLcat (lol_us)

### Follow us on other platforms!
